title: House of Lords pushes for Australian-style social media ban for under-16s
description: Peers, in vote of 266 to 141, reject Keir Starmer’s proposals for public consultation to decide if social media ban should be introduced in UK
content:
The House of Lords has backed an Australian-style social media ban for under-16s.
Peers, in a vote of 266 to 141, rejected Keir Starmer’s proposals for a public consultation to decide whether a ban should be introduced.

title: How a prolonged Middle East conflict could reshape how we fly
description: The Gulf's hub airports made long-distance travel cheaper - but now their future looks unclear.
content: It was once a humble outpost in the world of global aviation, a dusty overnight halt for luxury flying boats making the arduous journey from the UK to far-flung parts of the British Empire, such as India and Australia. By the 1960s, it had a simple r... [13679 chars]

title: Parents should monitor children 24/7 on Roblox, says developer
description: Roblox said safety was a top priority and it had advanced safeguards in place to keep users safe.
content:
An independent game developer for Roblox says he believes the platform's child safety measures, including age verification checks, do not go far enough.
Roblox is the most popular gaming platform in the UK among eight to 12-year-olds.

title: Camilla's love of books explored in BBC documentary
description: Queen Camilla is to appear in a BBC documentary about the life-changing power of books.
content:
Queen Camilla is to appear in a BBC documentary about the life-changing power of books.
The Queen will reflect on the childhood experiences that sparked her passion for reading and reflect on the comfort she still finds in books.

title: Ministers consider charging tourists to access UK national museum collections
description: Government says proposed levy for international tourists is part of initiative to improve arts funding
content:
Ministers are considering charging international tourists to access permanent collections at national museums as part of an initiative to improve arts funding.
